Cutting Knowledge Date: December 2023
Today Date: 26 Jul 2024

<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>user<|end_header_id|>

Write a haiku about foolish behavior in the form of a question, for an audience of young readers. It should include the topic of not studying. Give exactly two different responses, separated by 6 asterisk symbols (******), and include a title wrapped in double angular brackets, i.e. <<title>>. Do not use commas.<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>

Cutting Knowledge Date: December 2023
Today Date: 26 Jul 2024

<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>user<|end_header_id|>

Write a haiku about foolish behavior in the form of a question, for an audience of young readers. It should include the topic of not studying. Give exactly two different responses, separated by 6 asterisk symbols (******), and include a title wrapped in double angular brackets, i.e. <<title>>. Do not use commas.<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>

<<Why Waste Your Time>>

Will studying bring you fame
Or will you struggle all your life
Wise or foolish choice
